name_en: 💖【New】The classic interlocking letter pattern turns small daily essentials into fashion accessories. Novel textures and finishes shine in the Gucci new collection, showcasing dynamic energy and personal charm. This card case is crafted from deep grey and black grained calfskin, fully embellished with the GG logo.
name_cn:
💖【New】The classic interlocking letter pattern turns small daily essentials into fashion accessories. Novel textures and finishes shine in the Gucci new collection, showcasing dynamic energy and personal charm. This card case is crafted from deep grey and black grained calfskin, fully embellished with the GG logo.
Deep grey and black GG grained calfskin
Interior: 1 open pocket; Exterior: 5 card slots
Weight: approx. 52g
Model: 812681
Dimensions: 12cm (W) x 8cm (H)
Color: Grey/Original leather
Italian creation
